evidence_phrases: Record quarterly Data Center revenue of $62.3 billion
the agentic AI inflection point has arrived
Grace Blackwell with NVLink is the king of inference today
Enterprise adoption of agents is skyrocketing
approximations: GAAP and non-GAAP operating expenses are expected to be approximately $7.7 billion and $7.5 billion, respectively
qualitative_signals.ceo_quote_primary: Computing demand is growing exponentially — the agentic AI inflection point has arrived. Grace Blackwell with NVLink is the king of inference today — delivering an order-of-magnitude lower cost per token — and Vera Rubin will extend that leadership even further. Enterprise adoption of agents is skyrocketing. Our customers are racing to invest in AI compute — the factories powering the AI industrial revolution and their future growth.

source_quotes.results_actual.diluted_share_count_m: Weighted average shares used in diluted net income per share computation 24,432 (in millions)

ambiguous_items.explanation: Computed as Non-GAAP operating income ($46,107M) / Revenue ($68,127M) × 100 = 67.7%. Not explicitly stated in document.

Beginning in Q1 FY2027, NVIDIA will include stock-based compensation expense in non-GAAP financial measures. This is a major methodology change affecting comparability with prior periods. Stock-based compensation expense for Q1 FY2027 is expected to have 0.1% impact on non-GAAP gross margin and $1.9 billion in non-GAAP operating expenses.
